tasks.description: Add x402 Foundation trust badge and PACT section to landing page (login/page.tsx)
tasks.context:
FILE: frontend/app/login/page.tsx (130 lines — safe for swarm) READ THE FILE FIRST. The x402 Foundation launched April 2, 2026 under the Linux Foundation with Stripe, Coinbase, and AWS as founding members. This is a massive trust signal for Invoica. SURGICAL EDIT 1 — Add trust badge section AFTER the existing tagline. Find the tagline text about 'the open protocol for agent payments' and ADD AFTER the element containing it:
x402 Foundation Linux Foundation · Stripe · Coinbase · AWS
SURGICAL EDIT 2 — Add PACT feature card to the features grid. Find the features grid (look for 'Settlement Detection' or 'Business Verification' cards) and ADD a new card:

Trust-Gated Sessions

PACT protocol — agents get spending ceilings based on Helixa reputation scores. Higher trust = higher limits.

IMPORTANT: - Adapt class names to match the existing design system in the file - Do NOT rewrite the file — surgical edits only - Keep the file under 160 lines AFTER: 1. wc -l frontend/app/login/page.tsx — must be under 160 lines 2. grep 'x402 Foundation' frontend/app/login/page.tsx — must match 3. grep 'PACT\|Trust-Gated' frontend/app/login/page.tsx — must match 4. Do NOT touch any other file
